title: Credential Black-Market Pricing
html:
Stub. 2008 reference prices (per Symantec data cited by Felt et al.):

  • Bank account credentials: $10–$1,000
  • Credit card numbers: $0.10–$25
  • Email account passwords: $4–$30
  • Email addresses: $0.33/MB to $40/MB
  • Legitimate ad libraries earn $1.90–$9.50/user/month

Useful upper bound on the value of a single user's profile data. First mentioned in 2025 06 01 mobile malware credentials sms.

related.label: Mobile malware survey — credential theft, premium SMS, 2FA bypass, IMEI defenses
